name: Gianmarco Soresi
bio: Gianmarco Soresi is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and podcaster born in Maryland, known for sharp observational jokes and widely shared crowd-work clips. He hosts the interview podcast The Downside with Gianmarco Soresi and was selected as a Just for Laughs New Face in 2022.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up comedy in New York
Releases first half-hour of material, Shelf Life
Selected as a Just for Laughs New Face
Releases hour-long special Thief of Joy on YouTube

bits.t: Turning Point USA Visits University and Drama Ensues

bits.yt_title: Turning Point USA Visits University and Drama Ensues | Gianmarco Soresi | Stand Up Comedy Crowd Work
